verdict: Moderate displacement risk, with some tasks being automated but still requiring human judgment and physical dexterity.

reasoning_steps.title: Routine Cognitive Tasks
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks like testing drive vehicles, using infrared engine analyzers, and adjusting repaired systems are highly routine and can be automated by AI.

reasoning_steps.title: Physical Dexterity Moat
reasoning_steps.body: The physical demands of the job, such as aligning wheels and axles, and performing tear-downs and rebuilds, provide a strong moat against automation.

reasoning_steps.title: Stakes of Error
reasoning_steps.body: While errors can be costly, they are often reversible and do not result in catastrophic consequences, reducing the need for human oversight.

evidence_ledger.contribution: O*NET task list provided a clear understanding of the tasks involved in being a mechanic.
The Wikipedia summary provided context on the role of mechanics and their use of tools to build, maintain, or repair machinery.

adjacent_careers.name: Automotive Technician
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Automotive technicians perform similar tasks, but with less emphasis on physical dexterity and more focus on diagnostic equipment.

adjacent_careers.name: Engineer (Mechanical)
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Engineers design and develop new mechanical systems, which requires a deeper understanding of engineering principles than being a mechanic.

recent_developments.headline: New Diagnostic Tool Released for Automotive Industry
recent_developments.impact: This new tool may automate some diagnostic tasks, but human judgment and expertise will still be required.

recent_developments.headline: Hands-on trades remain among the least automated
recent_developments.impact: Physical, in-situ work captures very little AI use today; trades have the lowest exposure of any major occupation group.

quotes.quote: We do not have enough plumbers, electricians, or HVAC techs. AI cannot fix a leaking pipe. The shortage in the trades is only going to widen.
quotes.speaker: Mike Rowe
quotes.title: Host of Dirty Jobs; founder, mikeroweWORKS Foundation

quotes.quote: The tasks most exposed to large language models are not physical. Plumbers, electricians, and construction workers have the lowest exposure of any major occupation group.
quotes.speaker: Tyna Eloundou and Pamela Mishkin
quotes.title: Researchers, OpenAI
quotes.source: GPTs are GPTs: An Early Look at the Labor Market Impact Potential of LLMs

quotes.quote: The world is short on skilled tradespeople and we have spent two generations telling kids the only path is a four-year degree. AI is now coming for the desk jobs first.
quotes.speaker: Mark Cuban
quotes.title: Investor; co-founder, Cost Plus Drugs
